title: Checkpoint B — Multi-Table Report
description: A query checkpoint that ties Modules 05–08 together on one seeded four-table store schema (customer, product, sales_order, order_item). Write a series of join-based reports: a two-table inner join, a three-table join with aggregation, a four-table LEFT JOIN that reports true zeros, and a LEFT JOIN anti-join for never-ordered products. Comes right after Module 08 (Joins).
